$comment: Project settings for Claude Code, shipped with the template. VISION.md is human-only: the permission deny-rules below discourage agent writes (advisory pattern matches), and the PreToolUse hook (.claude/hooks/protect-vision.sh) is the enforced backstop that hard-blocks Edit/Write/MultiEdit targeting VISION.md. Humans change VISION.md directly. See AGENTS.md hard rules and .github/CODEOWNERS.
